_doc: Pairs of concept slugs that bin/check-concept-similarity.py should
skip when comparing tag-overlap and perceptual-hash distance.
Add an entry here when the Proprietor has reviewed a flagged pair
and decided to keep both — typically because the third (or
fourth) axis genuinely separates them in spite of the overlap, or
because both mockups are placeholders awaiting a refresh and the
Each entry is a 2-element array of slugs. Order doesn't matter.
Add a `note` sibling for every entry so the next person to look
knows why the pair was waved through.
